smoke.name: body-only-from-dispatch-record
command: set -euo pipefail; root='out/tests/script-smoke/create-plan-issue-sprint-pr'; rm -rf "$root"; mkdir -p "$root"; dispatch="$root/dispatch-S2T3.json"; printf '%s\n' '{"task_id":"S2T3","task_ids":["S2T3","S2T4"],"branch":"issue-12-s2-storage","base_branch":"plan/issue-12","worktree_abs_path":"/abs/worktree"}' > "$dispatch"; skills/workflows/pr/plan-issue/create-plan-issue-sprint-pr/scripts/create-plan-issue-sprint-pr.sh --dispatch-record "$dispatch" --issue 12 --summary 'Sprint 2 completes the storage lane.' --scope 'src/storage/: implements S2T3 and S2T4.' --testing 'scripts/check.sh --tests -- -k storage (pass)' --body-only
